meta.name: Mugen
meta.tagline: A free, open REST API for anime, manga, and movies — no key required.
meta.description: Mugen aggregates streaming sources and metadata from multiple providers across anime, manga, and movies. All endpoints return clean JSON. No authentication needed.

categories.name: Anime
categories.description: Stream anime episodes from multiple providers. Supports sub and dub, multiple servers, and direct M3U8 extraction.

providers.name: AnimeKai
providers.description: AnimeKai is a fast anime streaming site with a wide catalog. Supports both sub and dub. Streams are extracted as M3U8.

endpoints.description: Returns the homepage content of AnimeKai — trending, recently updated, and popular anime. Great for building a discover or browse section in your app.
Search for anime by title or keyword. Returns a list of matching results with slugs you can use for the info endpoint.

params.name: q
params.description: The search query — anime title or keyword.

endpoints.description: Returns full metadata for an anime — title, synopsis, genres, total episodes, and the ani_id needed to fetch episodes.

params.name: slug
params.description: The anime slug from search results.

response_example.title: Attack on Titan
response_example.synopsis: Humans live behind walls to survive giant humanoid Titans...

endpoints.description: Returns the full list of available episodes for an anime. Each episode has a token used to fetch available servers.

params.name: ani_id
params.description: The anime ID returned from the info endpoint.

endpoints.description: Returns available streaming servers for a given episode. Each server has a link_id you use to get the actual stream.

params.name: ep_token
params.description: The episode token from the episodes endpoint.

endpoints.description: Resolves a server link to actual streaming URLs. Returns a list of quality options and a top-level m3u8 field with the best HLS stream ready to play.

params.name: link_id
params.description: The server link ID from the servers endpoint.

providers.name: AnimePahe
providers.description: AnimePahe is known for small-sized, high-quality anime encodes. Good for users on limited bandwidth. Episodes use Kwik as the streaming host.
providers.note: Streaming requires two steps: call /stream to get the Kwik URL, then call /kwik to resolve the final M3U8.

endpoints.description: Returns the latest released anime episodes on AnimePahe. Useful for showing recent activity to your users.
Search the AnimePahe catalog. Returns anime sessions — the session value is used in all subsequent calls for that anime.
Returns metadata for an anime — title, synopsis, genres, year, and episode count.

params.name: session
params.description: The anime session ID from search results.

endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of episodes. Each episode has its own session ID for streaming.
Returns the Kwik embed link for an episode. This is an intermediate step — pass the kwik_url to the /kwik endpoint to get the final playable M3U8.

response_example.note: Call /api/anime/animepahe/kwik?url=<kwik_url> to resolve to final m3u8

endpoints.description: Takes a Kwik embed URL and resolves it to a final, playable M3U8 stream. This is the last step in the AnimePahe streaming flow.

params.name: url
params.description: The Kwik embed URL from the /stream endpoint.

providers.name: Animetsu
providers.description: Animetsu provides a large anime catalog with multiple quality options. Supports sub, dub, and multiple CDN servers.

endpoints.description: Returns homepage sections including trending, recently aired, and top-rated anime.
Returns recently released anime episodes. Paginated, and you can control how many results you get back.
Full-text search across the Animetsu catalog. Supports pagination.
Returns complete metadata: title, cover, synopsis, genres, year, season, status, and related entries.

params.name: anime_id
params.description: The anime ID from search results.

endpoints.description: Returns all available episodes for the specified anime.

data.title: The Day I Became a Shinigami

endpoints.description: Lists all available streaming servers for a specific episode. Returns sub and dub options from different CDN providers.
Fetches the actual stream URLs from a given server. Returns sources list and a top-level m3u8 field.

providers.name: Kuudere
providers.description: Kuudere is a clean anime streaming site. Supports recommendations and direct stream resolution.

endpoints.description: Returns featured and recently updated anime from Kuudere's homepage.
Search the Kuudere catalog by title or keyword.
Returns a quick summary card for an anime — useful for hover tooltips or preview modals without loading the full detail page.
Returns a list of anime recommended based on the given anime. Great for building a 'You might also like' section.

params.name: anime_id
params.description: The anime ID to base recommendations on.

endpoints.description: Returns the streaming embed links for a given episode. The m3u8 field is extracted and surfaced directly for convenience.

providers.name: Anidap
providers.description: Anidap provides anime streaming with trending and recent sections. Supports multiple host servers for each episode.

endpoints.description: Search Anidap's catalog by title.
Returns currently trending anime on Anidap. Updated frequently.
Returns the most recently released anime episodes on Anidap.
Returns complete metadata for a specific anime.
Returns all episodes for the specified anime.
Returns available streaming servers for a specific episode.
Fetches the actual stream from a chosen server. Returns sources and a top-level m3u8 field.

providers.name: Anikage
providers.description: Anikage is an anime streaming provider with sub and dub support across multiple CDN servers.

endpoints.description: Search Anikage for anime by title or keyword.
Returns complete metadata for an anime — title, cover, synopsis, episode count, and status.
Returns all available episodes for an anime.
Returns available servers for a specific episode — useful for giving users server choice.
Resolves a specific server to actual streaming URLs. Returns sources with qualities and a top-level m3u8 when available.

categories.name: Manga
categories.description: Read manga chapters with high-quality page images from multiple providers.

providers.name: Comix
providers.description: Comix.to is a manga reading platform with a large catalog. Returns chapter images as a list of CDN image URLs.

endpoints.description: Returns featured and recently updated manga from Comix.
Search the Comix catalog by title or keyword. Returns results with hash_id and manga_id fields needed for subsequent calls.
Returns full metadata for a manga — title, synopsis, genres, status, and the hash_id used in other endpoints.
Returns a paginated list of chapters. Each chapter has a numeric chapter_id used to fetch images.
Returns all page images for a chapter as an array of objects with width, height, and CDN URL. Ready to render directly.

params.name: chapter_slug
params.description: The numeric chapter_id from the chapters list.

providers.name: Atsu
providers.description: Atsu is a manga source with a broad catalog and clean image CDN.

endpoints.description: Returns featured and popular manga from Atsu's homepage.
Search Atsu's catalog. Returns manga with IDs used for detail and chapter requests.
Returns full details for a manga including synopsis, author, genres, and chapter list.
Returns all page image URLs for a specific chapter.

providers.name: Nato
providers.description: Nato is a manga reader with clean image delivery and a broad catalog.

endpoints.description: Returns popular and recently updated manga from Nato.
Search Nato's manga catalog. Returns slugs used for subsequent calls.
Returns full manga metadata and a list of chapters.
Returns all page image URLs for a chapter.

categories.name: Movies & TV
categories.description: Stream movies and TV series from multiple providers. Returns M3U8 streams, captions, and full metadata.

providers.name: MovieBox
providers.description: MovieBox (moviebox.ph) has a large catalog of movies, TV series, and animations with multi-language support, dubs, and subtitles.

endpoints.description: Returns the MovieBox homepage — banner items, popular series, trending movies, and more. Each item includes a slug and subject_id for detail lookups.
Returns a paginated list of movies. Sort by recommendation, newest, rating, or most watched.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order: RECOMMEND, NEWEST, RATING, MOST_PLAY.

endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of TV series. Same sort options as movies.
Returns a paginated list of animated content.
Search across all MovieBox content — movies, series, and animation. Returns slugs and subject IDs.
Returns quick autocomplete suggestions for a query — great for a live search box.
Returns complete metadata: title, description, genre, country, IMDb rating, poster, trailer, cast, available dubs per language (each with its own slug), and season/episode info for series.

params.name: slug
params.description: The content slug from search or home.

response_example.title: Avengers: Endgame
response_example.description: After Thanos erased half of all life...

endpoints.description: Returns stream sources for a movie or TV episode. For movies use se=0&ep=0. For series pass the season and episode numbers. Returns sources list, m3u8 if available, and whether content is limited.
Returns available subtitle/caption tracks for a movie or episode — includes language, label, and VTT/SRT URL.

providers.name: VidLink
providers.description: VidLink provides TMDB-based movie and TV streaming. Pass a TMDB ID and get a direct M3U8 stream back.

endpoints.description: Returns streaming sources for a movie using its TMDB ID. The m3u8 field is surfaced at the top level for easy access.
Returns streaming sources for a TV episode using its TMDB ID, season, and episode number.

providers.name: VidNest
providers.description: VidNest supports TMDB-based movies and TV, plus AniList-based anime streaming. Also provides subtitle tracks.

endpoints.description: Returns stream sources for a movie or TV episode using its TMDB ID. Specify mediaType as 'movie' or 'tv'.
Returns streaming sources for an anime episode using its AniList ID. Supports sub and dub.
Returns available subtitle tracks for a movie or TV episode.

providers.name: Videasy
providers.description: Videasy aggregates streams from multiple providers. Supports movies and TV with optional provider selection.

endpoints.description: Returns streaming sources from Videasy. Provide the title, TMDB ID, and media type. Optionally select a provider and pass IMDb ID or year for better matching.
